title: Vorlitix's Bullets
body:
Changes arrows to bullets!

In fact, these bullets are 9mm Mauser and 8mm Mauser, however I classified them as "9mm Bullet" and "8mm Bullet" to be easier to find, hence the pack name.

Why mauser bullets? Well, this pack is supposed to be paired with [Pekit's Bows to Guns WWII edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pekits-bows-to-guns-wwii). **Please** go shoot them a download, as their guns pair perfectly, and are meant to pair, with these bullets! **These guns do NOT require optifine** to work. They work perfectly on vanilla, as well as these bullets due to the bullets just being a retexture of the arrow.

I have also implemented different noises to the arrow landing noise to make them sound somewhat realistic.

This pack **should** support 1.14 and above but is specifically made for 1.19.

Enjoy!
